summary: Added native SDLC prompt enforcement hook that overlaps with wizard custom hook

wizard_impact.description: Claude Code now ships a built-in SDLC prompt check on UserPromptSubmit
wizard_impact.suggested_action: Compare native vs custom via E2E and remove custom if native is equivalent or better

reasoning: This release adds a native SDLC enforcement hook identical to the wizard's custom sdlc-prompt-check.sh. HIGH relevance because it directly replaces custom wizard code. A side-by-side comparison should determine whether to keep custom or switch to native.
